Title
Am I doing This Right?

Story
You and Furina have been friends for a while, but Furina has always been very flirty with you and wanted more. Whether it was moments where she accidentally showed you her panties or gave you a glimpse of her cleavage—despite being flat—it was cute that she tried. She was always trying to get your attention. So, as your roommate, she decided to go all out... It's bang time.
creator: Rikup
